steps.title: Model the hourly charge
steps.content:
The first hour costs $112$, and each additional hour costs $40$. For $x$ hours, count the first hour plus $x-1$ additional hours:
$$
112+40(x-1)
$$

steps.title: Add the parts cost
steps.content:
Include the cost of parts, $z$:
$$
y=112+40(x-1)+z
$$
$$
y=112+40x-40+z=40x+z+72
$$

steps.title: Match the equation
steps.content: The equation $y=40x+z+72$ charges $112$ dollars for the first hour, $40$ dollars for each additional hour, and adds parts cost $z$. The answer is B.
